overview.description: Self test for command: Repeat with condition — verifies that repeat is skipped when condition is false and executes when condition is true
overview.name: Repeat self with condition

condition.comment: Define a condition that always evaluates to false — used to trigger repeat skip
condition.name: alwaysFalseCondition

condition.comment: Define a condition that always evaluates to true — used as a positive control
condition.name: alwaysTrueCondition

var.comment: Initialize value with constant before repeat starts — must remain 'initial' if repeat is skipped
var.name: value

repeat.comment: This repeat must be skipped entirely because alwaysFalseCondition is false

var.comment: This var must never be executed — value must not be overwritten
var.name: value

assert.comment: Verify value remains 'initial' — the repeat block was not executed due to the false condition

equal.comment: value must equal 'initial' — repeat was skipped

repeat.comment: This repeat must execute because condition is true

var.comment: Overwrite value — this must execute on each iteration
var.name: value

assert.comment: Verify the true-condition repeat did execute and value was overwritten

equal.comment: value should equal 'overwritten' after true-condition repeat ran
